problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: If Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue is applied to prevented, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
